{{CargoClone
|name=Tenkuu
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=159
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Water DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=For Round 1, All ELMT DMG +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=For Round 1, All ELMT DMG +2.5%
|}}
